CASE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, SETTLED AS FOLLOWS: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. DEFENDANT AGREES TO VACATE THE PREMISES AT 1526 HAIGHT STREET, S.F. BY 5PM 3-31-98. IF DEFT VACATES & RETURNS ALL KEYS TO PLAINTIFF, PLTF AGREES TO WAIVE RENT FROM 11-97 THRU 3-09 & DISM W/PREJ. IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE, JUDGMENT WILL BE ENTERED FOR FORFEITURE OF LEASE, RESTITUTION OF PREMISES, AND $10,000 IN TOTAL RENT, DAMAGES, AND FEES. 3-9-98 TRIAL VACATED.
